description_long: This object is a modern over-ear headset with a built-in microphone, commonly used for communication or audio playback in urban environments. The headset features two large, cushioned ear cups connected by a curved, padded headband, providing comfort for extended use. One ear cup is equipped with a flexible boom microphone that extends outward, allowing for clear voice transmission. The exterior of the ear cups displays a circular design with subtle accent markings and what appears to be a small logo or label. The headset is primarily composed of plastic and synthetic materials, with visible foam padding on the ear cups for noise isolation. A cable extends from one side, indicating a wired connection for power or audio signal.
description: A modern over-ear headset with cushioned ear cups, a flexible boom microphone, and a wired connection, designed for comfortable audio communication.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the headband arch and the circular design on the ear cups, with the microphone boom visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cups, the curvature of the headband, and the protruding microphone boom.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the headband and the ear cups, with the microphone boom extending outward.
description_view_3: Front view displaying both ear cups, the headband arch, and the microphone positioned in front of the left ear cup.
